schools.subtitle: Here is an overview of your Dual Rise journey

briefingBanner.title: Prepare for your coach call
briefingBanner.subtitle: your agent has prepared a brief for you

sync.title: Sync your calendar
sync.subtitle: Stay up to date on your phone / Google Calendar / iCal.

tasks.title: My tasks
tasks.helper: 💡 Tasks assigned by your agent appear here. Tick them off once done so they get notified.
tasks.empty: No tasks yet. Check back later!

notes.title: Notes from my agent
notes.helper: 💡 Messages, context and follow-ups sent by your agent. Your parents can see these too.

parcours.title: My US golf & study journey
parcours.subtitle: Overview of the 7 phases of your project, from the Dual Rise contract to arrival on campus.

acquisition.label: Onboarding & contract
acquisition.description: First contact with Dual Rise, contract signed, first deposit paid. Project officially kicked off.

profile.label: Profile creation
profile.description: Full questionnaire, swing videos, HD photo, recruiting highlight reel, SCOUT profile built. This is your calling card for coaches.

recruiting.label: Active recruiting
recruiting.description: Your agent sends your profile to target schools and handles follow-ups. You start calls with interested coaches. The longest and most intense phase.

offers.label: Offers & negotiation
offers.description: First offers come in. Compare schools (cost, location, fit, level). Optional visits. Negotiate scholarships.

commitment.label: Commitment & signing
commitment.description: Final choice, verbal commit on Instagram, NLI signed in November (early signing) or April (regular). It's official.

admin.label: Visa & admin
admin.description: I-20 from the school, SEVIS fee, DS-160 form, Paris embassy interview for the F-1 visa. Housing, insurance and flights ready.

departure.label: Departure & US arrival
departure.description: Off to the US! First month on campus: bank account, SSN, phone plan, team integration, first classes.

welcomeModal.title: Welcome {firstName} 👋
welcomeModal.intro: This dashboard centralizes your Dual Rise recruiting journey:
bullets: ✅ Your admin checklist (visa, INCRED, English tests…)
📝 Notes and advice from your agent
welcomeModal.privacy: 🔒 Your data is stored in Europe and handled per the terms of your signed Dual Rise contract.

resources.title: Resources
resources.subtitle: Everything you need to understand before and during your US project

rankingImpact.title: Ranking & Impact Table
rankingImpact.description: How French players transition to the US based on their national ranking

interviewPrep.title: My interview prep
interviewPrep.subtitle: Custom notes from your agent — read before your next coach calls.
interviewPrep.emptyHint: Your agent will add the questions and key points to highlight before your next coach calls here.
interviewPrep.readGuide: In the meantime, read the communication guide →

resources.commsCoachBanner: You have a personalized prep for your recruiting.
